authorization_id.description: Authorization ID links the request to payer decisions, claim edits, and appeals.

request_status.description: Status determines whether the downstream workflow releases, appeals, or holds care.

patient_member_id.description: Member ID is required for eligibility, payer lookup, and claims matching.

requesting_provider_npi.description: Provider NPI identifies the ordering clinician or organization.

procedure_codes.description: CPT/HCPCS codes define the requested service and payer coverage rules.

denial_reason_text.description: Denial rationale is required for appeal packet preparation.
